source_jobs.title: General Consideration
source_jobs.description:
Vidmob is the creative data company. Its scoring software and analytics have become an essential ingredient in the creative and media decisions of the world’s largest marketers and agencies, as they strive to drive business results through improved creative effectiveness. As the leader in creative data, Vidmob’s influence lies in its partnerships and integrations across the digital ad ecosystem, its dozens of proprietary models, and in operating the industry’s most robustly instrumented human-reinforcement learning model for creativity. 



Don't see a job listing that best matches your interests or background? Submit your application here for general consideration. We're always looking for great talent to join our team! 

Please complete all of the general application questions applicable to your experience - this will help us find your information quickly for roles that fit your background and skill set. If and when we have an opening that would be a fit, someone from our Talent Acquisition team will reach out to you directly.

Check back on our website periodically to see if any positions have opened up that pique your interest, and apply directly to those that align with your background and career goals.

Follow us on LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/company/vidmob as well to see all of our latest jobs and company updates!

Please be aware that Vidmob will only contact candidates through emails ending in @vidmob.com http://vidmob.com. We will never ask for personal information, such as your Social Security number, bank account number, or password, through email. If you receive an email claiming to be from Vidmob that does not come from a @vidmob.com http://vidmob.com email address, or if the email asks for personal information, please do not respond and report the email to us at IT@vidmob.com

source_jobs.title: Account Executive (Existing Business)
source_jobs.description:
Vidmob is the creative data company. Its scoring software and analytics have become an essential ingredient in the creative and media decisions of the world’s largest marketers and agencies, as they strive to drive business results through improved creative effectiveness. As the leader in creative data, Vidmob’s influence lies in its partnerships and integrations across the digital ad ecosystem, its dozens of proprietary models, and in operating the industry’s most robustly instrumented human-reinforcement learning model for creativity. 



We're looking for a motivated and entrepreneurial Account Executive to join our team and help us accelerate our revenue growth. This isn't just about upselling—it's about helping us build deeper, more strategic relationships with our existing clients. You'll be a key player in our growth, not only by expanding revenue within our current accounts but also by helping to define our customer success strategies, test new expansion motions, and refine our product packaging.



This role is for someone who thrives in a fast-paced, scrappy environment and is energized by the challenge of uncovering untapped potential within our customer base. You will be responsible for driving renewals, identifying expansion opportunities, growing account revenue, and supporting our mission to define a new space in the adtech ecosystem.



What you’ll do:

 - Drive expansion and renewals: You'll be a true farmer, responsible for identifying growth opportunities within your book of business and ensuring high renewal rates. You'll proactively uncover new use cases, additional departments, and expanded product adoption within existing accounts.

 - Develop strategic account plans: You'll create and execute strategic account plans focused on identifying upsell, cross-sell, and expansion opportunities in partnership with Account Managers. This includes conducting regular executive business reviews to demonstrate ROI, align on strategic objectives, and uncover new growth opportunities.

 - Deepen and broaden relationships: You'll build and maintain strong relationships with C-level and VP-level stakeholders while expanding your footprint within accounts—connecting with new departments, senior leaders, and cross-functional teams to drive enterprise-wide adoption and navigate complex decision-making structures.

 - Lead renewals and negotiations: You'll lead contract renewal negotiations, ensuring high retention rates while maximizing deal value and contract terms. You'll manage complex sales cycles within existing accounts, navigating multiple decision-makers and budget holders.

 - Be a strategic partner and trusted advisor: You'll work closely with internal teams—including Account Management, Product, and Marketing—to provide customer feedback, align client needs with our roadmap, and help refine our expansion strategy. You'll use data, customer insights, and industry expertise to create compelling business cases and proposals that articulate incremental value and justify expanded investment.

 - Own your outcomes with operational excellence: You'll manage your entire book of business with precision, including expansion pipeline management, accurate forecasting, and maintaining pipeline hygiene in CRM. You'll embrace deep customer relationship mapping, proactive activity tracking, and transparent sales forecast management to leadership to ensure predictable revenue delivery.



What we’re looking for:

 - Proven expansion and retention success: You have a track record of successfully driving revenue growth within existing accounts and achieving high renewal rates while hitting or exceeding your sales targets, particularly in a software or SaaS environment; 7+ years of experience in Enterprise software sales, with martech/adtech experience preferred.

 - Early-stage mentality: You have experience working in a fast-moving startup and know what it takes to get things done without a lot of predefined processes. You're reso

source_jobs.title: Partner Manager
source_jobs.description:
Vidmob is the creative data company. Its scoring software and analytics have become an essential ingredient in the creative and media decisions of the world’s largest marketers and agencies, as they strive to drive business results through improved creative effectiveness. As the leader in creative data, Vidmob’s influence lies in its partnerships and integrations across the digital ad ecosystem, its dozens of proprietary models, and in operating the industry’s most robustly instrumented human-reinforcement learning model for creativity. 



We're looking for a Partner Manager to own and grow a portfolio of strategic partnerships. You'll manage and deepen relationships with the media and adtech partners that are core to how Vidmob creates value — advertising platforms, DSPs, measurement and attribution providers, data and clean room partners — serving as their primary point of contact and ensuring they're activated, engaged, and seeing results.

It's a role for someone who thrives on relationship management and execution — someone who can walk into a room with a partner, speak confidently about what Vidmob does and what our packages include, and leave with clear next steps. You know how to keep partners happy, how to keep programs running smoothly, and how to spot opportunities to go deeper.

Reporting to the CRO, you'll be the day-to-day point of contact for your partner portfolio, responsible for activation, performance, and long-term growth.



What You'll Do

 - Own end-to-end relationship management for a portfolio of strategic partners spanning media platforms, DSPs, measurement and attribution providers, data and clean room partners, and AI and creative technology partnerships

 - Manage and grow Vidmob's platform partnerships — Google, LinkedIn, Pinterest, Amazon, and others — driving deeper integration, joint go-to-market activity, and measurable mutual value

 - Drive partner activation and adoption by working closely with Vidmob's product, operations, and revenue teams to ensure smooth onboarding, clear value delivery, and a strong partner experience

 - Develop a deep understanding of each partner's business objectives, go-to-market strategy, and technical architecture to identify new areas of collaboration, data sharing, and expansion

 - Help define how Vidmob's creative intelligence integrates into partner platforms, data environments, and AI-driven workflows — turning partnership agreements into embedded, scalable solutions

 - Monitor and report on partner performance, identifying trends, surfacing risks, and proactively recommending optimizations to maximize impact

 - Prepare and deliver regular business reviews with partners, synthesizing performance data into clear narratives and forward-looking recommendations

 - Collaborate cross-functionally with sales, product, marketing, and legal to execute partnership initiatives and resolve operational issues

 - Contribute to the development of scalable partner management processes, playbooks, and frameworks as the team and partner ecosystem grow

 - Represent Vidmob at industry events and partner meetings, building broad relationships across partner organizations



What You'll Bring

 - 5-7 years of experience in partnerships, business development, or account management within the media and adtech industry

 - Genuine, working knowledge of the media and adtech ecosystem — how platforms, DSPs, measurement providers, data partners, and clean rooms fit together and where the value flows

 - Direct experience working with or alongside advertising platforms such as Google, Meta, LinkedIn, Pinterest, Amazon, or TikTok

 - Comfort with technical partnership conversations — you don't need to be an engineer, but you need to understand how API integrations, data licensing, and clean room environments work well enough to move deals forward and represent Vidmob credibly

 - Analytical mindset with the ability to interpret data, build reporting, and translate insights into c

source_jobs.title: Staff Data Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Vidmob is the creative data company. Its scoring software and analytics have become an essential ingredient in the creative and media decisions of the world’s largest marketers and agencies, as they strive to drive business results through improved creative effectiveness. As the leader in creative data, Vidmob’s influence lies in its partnerships and integrations across the digital ad ecosystem, its dozens of proprietary models, and in operating the industry’s most robustly instrumented human-reinforcement learning model for creativity. 



We are seeking an experienced Staff Data Engineer to architect, scale, and operationalize the data systems that power Vidmob’s creative intelligence platform.

Vidmob turns creative into a measurable growth driver by connecting creative assets, model outputs, platform metadata, media delivery, and business outcomes. That requires scalable, reliable data platforms for analytics, machine learning, customer-facing reporting, APIs, partner integrations, and AI-driven workflows.

This role is especially important as Vidmob builds more products driven by ML and AI, including LLMs, VLMs, creative scoring systems, and agentic workflows. We need a data engineering leader who can partner deeply with Data Science to productionize models, serve model outputs reliably, and turn experimental intelligence into durable customer-facing products.

Because AI is changing how data systems are built and consumed, you need to be an AI-forward practitioner. You will use AI to accelerate engineering, validation, observability, root-cause analysis, documentation, and data discovery.

Our global team works in English, so strong written and spoken English skills are essential. This position is most remote, but periodic international travel within Latam or to the US will be required.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Architect Scalable Data Platforms: Lead the design and development of data systems that support analytics, ML/AI products, reporting, APIs, integrations, and customer-facing data products.

 - Own the Data Lifecycle: Drive ingestion, transformation, modeling, validation, lineage, publishing, and serving across Vidmob’s creative, media, customer, model-output, and performance data.

 - Build Reliable Pipelines: Architect batch and near-real-time pipelines that are scalable, observable, replayable, and cost-efficient.

 - Productionize ML and AI Products: Partner with Data Science to turn models, scores, embeddings, prompts, evaluations, and experimental outputs into reliable production data products and customer-facing capabilities.

 - Support LLM and VLM Workflows: Build data foundations for AI-powered products using LLMs, VLMs, multimodal analysis, agent workflows, and reinforcement learning.

 - Define and Enforce Data Standards: Establish best practices for data contracts, pipeline design, testing, reviews, observability, and production readiness.

 - Create Trusted Data Products: Build governed datasets and serving patterns that support dashboards, APIs, exports, partner integrations, ML workflows, benchmarks, and agent-ready use cases.

 - Support Platform and Partner Integrations: Build reliable data flows with ad platforms, DSPs, measurement partners, creative systems, customer environments, and internal product surfaces.

 - Shape Platform Strategy: Influence long-term decisions around tooling, storage, processing frameworks, serving patterns, governance, and cost structure.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - Senior Technical Experience: 8+ years in data engineering, data platform engineering, or analytics engineering in SaaS, platform, AdTech, MarTech, marketplace, or other data-heavy environments.

 - Modern Data Platform Expertise: Deep experience with modern warehouse, lakehouse, orchestration, and transformation technologies including Snowflake, Databricks, and BigQuery, as well as relational and noSQL databases.

 - Strong Engineering Foundations: Production-grade SQL and strong programming skills in Pyth

source_jobs.title: Staff DevOps Security Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Vidmob is the creative data company. Its scoring software and analytics have become an essential ingredient in the creative and media decisions of the world’s largest marketers and agencies, as they strive to drive business results through improved creative effectiveness. As the leader in creative data, Vidmob’s influence lies in its partnerships and integrations across the digital ad ecosystem, its dozens of proprietary models, and in operating the industry’s most robustly instrumented human-reinforcement learning model for creativity. 



About the role:

We are seeking an experienced Staff DevOps Engineer for a hybrid role to architect, scale, and automate our cloud infrastructure, as well as serve as a tech lead for infrastructure security.

As a growing startup, we believe process is the servant of results. We need a pragmatic, hands-on technical leader who builds robust systems that provide control and visibility without introducing process for process's sake. Our global team interacts in English, so strong written and spoken English skills are essential.

Because AI is transforming how products are built and deployed, you need to be an AI-forward practitioner. You will actively look for ways to weave AI into Vidmob’s DevOps operations to automate toil, improve alerting, and accelerate delivery.

In this role, you will operate and scale our primary infrastructure in AWS while spearheading our aggressive expansion into GCP to leverage Vertex AI. You will act as the Individual Contributor (IC) engineering lead for security execution and site reliability engineering (SRE) practice, and partner closely with our Data Science and Engineering teams to build scalable MLOps pipelines.



What you’ll do:

 - Architect Multi-Cloud Infrastructure: Assist in the the design and provisioning of our infrastructure. We are primarily an AWS environment, but you will architect and scale our growing footprint in Google Cloud Platform (GCP) to support advanced AI workloads.

 - Lead Security Implementations: Act as the lead IC engineer for security execution. You will be the critical bridge implementing InfoSec policies and SOC-2 requirements into our infrastructure and codebase.

 - Drive SRE Practice: Define and instrument SLOs/SLIs across critical services, lead incident response (on-call, postmortems, error budgets), and build out observability — metrics, traces, structured logs — to reduce toil and detect issues before they reach customers.

 - Automate with an AI-First Mindset: You will build, optimize, and maintain automated testing and deployment pipelines using GitLab CI/CD and GitOps principles. You will actively integrate AI tools (coding assistants, AIOps, intelligent monitoring) to automate and improve internal platform operations.

 - Drive MLOps and Data Infrastructure: Provision and manage the infrastructure for our heavy data and AI workloads. Build seamless model deployment pipelines and support infrastructure for Vertex AI, Amazon SageMaker, Databricks, Snowflake, and BigQuery.

 - Manage Containerized Workloads: Orchestrate container deployments using Kubernetes (EKS/GKE) and ECS. Implement self-healing mechanisms and autoscaling based on runtime metrics.

 - Create Execution Clarity: Partner with cross-functional teams (Engineering, Data Science, Product) to surface dependencies early. Produce crisp technical artifacts, architectural decision records (ADRs), and communicate clearly to prevent surprises and eliminate thrashing.

 - Build Right-Sized Processes: Continually iterate on how we deploy and scale. Implement lightweight feedback loops and infrastructure-as-code (Terraform/CloudFormation) practices that make the organization faster and more adaptive, not heavier.

 - Non-Human Identity Management: Create NHID processes and automation to ensure rapid and secure integration of tools and processes without manual, human overhead.
   
   

What we’re looking for:

 - Senior Technical Experience: 8+ years of hands-on ex

source_jobs.title: Senior Account Manager
source_jobs.description:
Vidmob is the creative data company. Its scoring software and analytics have become an essential ingredient in the creative and media decisions of the world’s largest marketers and agencies, as they strive to drive business results through improved creative effectiveness. As the leader in creative data, Vidmob’s influence lies in its partnerships and integrations across the digital ad ecosystem, its dozens of proprietary models, and in operating the industry’s most robustly instrumented human-reinforcement learning model for creativity. 



We're looking for a strategic, analytics-focused and customer-obsessed Account Manager to join our team and serve as the primary relationship owner for our enterprise clients. This role is about driving long-term customer success, maximizing product adoption, and ensuring our clients realize exceptional value from their partnership with Vidmob. You'll work hand-in-hand with our Account Executives to identify and develop growth opportunities while serving as the trusted day-to-day partner for our clients.



This is a role for someone who thrives on building deep customer relationships, solving complex problems, and thinking strategically about how to drive business outcomes. You'll be responsible for ensuring customer health, driving product adoption, and actively contributing to revenue growth through expansion within your accounts.



What you’ll do:

 - Own the end-to-end client relationship: Serve as the primary point of contact for a portfolio of enterprise accounts, building deep, trusted relationships with key stakeholders and ensuring exceptional customer experience throughout the client lifecycle.

 - Deliver data-driven insights: Work hands-on in the Vidmob platform to analyze campaign performance and translate data into compelling stories that demonstrate ROI and guide client strategy. Partner with outsourced analytics support while maintaining direct analytical capabilities and platform fluency.

 - Maximize product adoption and value realization: Become the expert in product capabilities and customer success best practices. Ensure seamless platform adoption, campaign/solution optimization, and maximum client ROI to drive long-term success and satisfaction.

 - Drive strategic account planning: Develop and execute strategic account plans focused on retention, expansion, and revenue growth. Proactively identify, qualify, and develop new upsell, cross-sell, and new use-case opportunities within your portfolio to expand account value.

 - Conduct strategic business reviews: Lead regular business reviews and executive-level conversations to demonstrate value, showcase ROI, align on strategic objectives, and uncover growth opportunities.

 - Monitor account health and mitigate risk: Proactively track account health metrics, identify early warning signs, and take action to address concerns before they impact retention or satisfaction.

 - Support revenue growth: Collaborate closely with Account Executives on expansion opportunities, providing customer insights and supporting the development of proposals. Negotiate contract renewals and expansions in partnership with sales leadership.

 - Be the voice of the customer: Act as the internal advocate for your clients, gathering and synthesizing feedback to influence product roadmap, go-to-market strategy, and operational improvements. Partner with Product, Marketing, and other teams to ensure customer needs are heard and addressed.

 - Orchestrate internal resources: Partner with cross-functional teams (AEs, Product, Finance) to deliver comprehensive client solutions and bring in the right expertise at the right time.

 - Maintain operational excellence: Keep detailed account documentation, track activity and engagement in CRM, and provide accurate health assessments and forecasts to leadership.



What we’re looking for:

 - Startup mentality: You're comfortable with ambiguity, adaptable to change, and ready to roll up your sleeves in a f

notes: Vidmob is a creative data company with a mix of tech and non-tech roles.
